name: pa-assistant
description: Personal assistant tool bundle for 1bit omni, routed through local Lemonade chat completions.

function.name: ask_pa_assistant
function.description: Ask a focused personal assistant to plan, triage, summarize, or turn operator context into concrete next actions. Use this for calendar-style planning, daily recaps, work triage, message drafts, checklist generation, and cross-app workflow planning.

context.description: Relevant local context, notes, transcripts, repo status, schedule details, or constraints.

messages.content: You are PA Assistant inside the 1bit-systems Lemonade OmniRouter loop. Convert messy operator context into short, concrete, prioritized actions. Prefer local-first workflows. Do not claim to have used external apps unless the caller supplied their output. Keep outputs compact and directly executable. /no_think
